name: Crispy Salmon Potato Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain and flake the canned Alaska salmon.
2. Peel and grate the baking potatoes using large holes of a cheese grater.
3. Combine the salmon, grated potatoes, remaining ingredients (except vegetable oil and applesauce), and mix well.
4. Heat vegetable oil in a large non-stick pan over medium-high heat.
5. Form the potato mixture into thin patties, using about 1/3 cup of mixture for each patty.
6. Fry the patties in the heated skillet for 3 minutes on each side or until they are crisp golden brown.
7. Serve with applesauce. Makes 4-6 servings (10-12 salmon potato cakes).
Note: The potato mixture may become liquid as it sits. Drain any excess liquid before forming the patties.
